author: anon-13168fa2
content: Replaced all Chainlink references with crosslink across curriculum: 02-the-methodology/02-tracking-your-work.md (rewrote the install section with cargo install crosslink, verified all command examples match the real CLI - crosslink quick, crosslink close, crosslink create, crosslink subissue top-level aliases; crosslink issue comment/tree/block/ready/next for subcommands that require the issue prefix), README.md:59, 03-real-world-skills/01-the-workshop.md:102, 04-proving-it/01-on-your-own.md:37, 04-proving-it/03-the-portfolio-review.md:73. Left CHANGELOG.md alone since those are historical records of commits that actually did use the old name.
